scripts.local:bootstrap: npm run setup:env && npm run db:start && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.local:verify: npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/shared && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/backend && npm run test --workspace @smartcrm/web && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/web
scripts.doctor: npm run setup:env && npm run db:start && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate
scripts.ci:verify: npm run setup:env && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run local:verify
scripts.cf:build: npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/shared && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/backend && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/web
scripts.dev:legacy: npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/shared && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c magenta,blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @smartcrm/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @smartcrm/api" "npm run dev --workspace @smartcrm/web"
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/shared && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/api && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/web
scripts.local:verify:legacy: npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/shared && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/api && npm run test --workspace @smartcrm/api && npm run test --workspace @smartcrm/web && npm run build --workspace @smartcrm/web
scripts.cf:dev: npm run cf:build && npx wrangler@latest pages dev apps/web/out --compatibility-date=2026-04-24
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run cf:build && npx wrangler@latest pages deploy apps/web/out --project-name smartcrm
